summary: Tested restored endpoints (mudras, videos, exercises) and Star Chart enhancements. All 3 previously broken endpoints now working correctly after JSONResponse import fix. Backend: 16/19 tests passed (3 cache header tests failed due to ingress override - not a code issue). Frontend: All 4 pages (Mudras, Videos, Exercises, Star Chart) load correctly with full functionality.

minor.issue: Cache-Control headers set in code (max-age=3600) are being overridden by ingress/proxy to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'. This is infrastructure behavior, not a code bug.

success_rate.backend: 84% (16/19 - 3 cache header tests failed due to infrastructure)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Restored endpoints verified: GET /api/mudras (25 items), GET /api/videos (23 items), GET /api/exercises (6 items). All return correct data fields. Star Chart page loads with 3D constellation map, location picker with preset cities, and constellation drawing animations. The JSONResponse import fix in media.py, practices.py, and wellness.py resolved the 'disappeared content' bug.

GET /api/mudras.description: Returns 25 mudras with all required fields (id, name, sanskrit, image_url, color, chakra, element, duration, benefits, description, practice, video_url, video_title, hand_position, category)

GET /api/videos.description: Returns 23 videos with all required fields (id, title, category, video_url, thumbnail, description, duration, level, instructor, tags)

GET /api/exercises.description: Returns 6 exercises with all required fields (id, name, category, steps, benefits, video_url, description, duration, level, philosophy, tips, color)

Mudras page /mudras.description: Renders 25 mudra cards in grid with images, names, category filters (All, Meditation, Healing, Energy, Devotional). Detail modal opens on click with tabs (Overview, Practice, Video).

Videos page /videos.description: Renders 23 video cards with thumbnails, play buttons, duration badges, and category filters. Video player opens on click with close button.

Exercises page /exercises.description: Renders 6 exercise cards with descriptions, philosophy quotes, benefits tags, and expandable step-by-step instructions. Filter tabs for All/Qigong/Tai Chi.

Star Chart page /star-chart.description: 3D constellation map loads after login with star glow sprites, constellation lines with drawing animation, location picker with preset cities (New York, London, Tokyo, Sydney, Cairo, Sao Paulo), and element legend.

Star Chart location picker.description: Opens with lat/lng inputs and preset city buttons. Selecting Tokyo reloads chart showing 16 visible constellations.

api_verification.GET /api/mudras: 200 OK - Returns array of 25 mudras with complete data
api_verification.GET /api/videos: 200 OK - Returns array of 23 videos with complete data
api_verification.GET /api/exercises: 200 OK - Returns array of 6 exercises with complete data

bug_fix_verification.issue: Mudras, Videos, and Exercises pages had 'disappeared' content
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Missing 'from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse' import in media.py, practices.py, and wellness.py
bug_fix_verification.fix_verified: All three endpoints now return data correctly. Frontend pages render content as expected.
